component.name: ChronoArchiver
component.summary: Organize media by date, batch AV1 encode, and AI-assisted scanning

description.p: ChronoArchiver combines three workflows in one desktop app: organize photos and videos into a folder structure from EXIF or container dates, encode batches to AV1 with configurable quality, and run an AI scanner for subject detection. Uses PySide6; FFmpeg is provided via static-ffmpeg where applicable.

screenshot.caption: Application icon (replace with a main-window screenshot when available)
